APIList.Name: CreateFirewall
APIList.Desc: 创建防火墙，规则格式：Protocol|Port|SrcIP|Action|Priority|Remark，如 TCP|3306|0.0.0.0/0|DROP|HIGH|Notes

APIList.Name: DeleteFirewall
APIList.Desc: 删除防火墙

APIList.Name: DescribeFirewall
APIList.Desc: 获取防火墙组信息

APIList.Name: DescribeFirewallResource
APIList.Desc: 获取防火墙组所绑定资源的外网IP

APIList.Name: GrantFirewall
APIList.Desc: 将防火墙应用到资源上

APIList.Name: DisassociateFirewall
APIList.Desc: 解绑资源上的防火墙

APIList.Name: UpdateFirewall
APIList.Desc: 更新防火墙规则，规则格式同 CreateFirewall

APIList.Name: UpdateFirewallAttribute
APIList.Desc: 更新防火墙名称、备注等属性

APIList.Name: AllocateEIP
APIList.Desc: 根据提供信息申请弹性IP

APIList.Name: BindEIP
APIList.Desc: 将尚未使用的弹性IP绑定到指定资源

APIList.Name: UnBindEIP
APIList.Desc: 将弹性IP从资源上解绑

APIList.Name: ReleaseEIP
APIList.Desc: 释放弹性IP资源，所释放弹性IP必须为非绑定状态

APIList.Name: DescribeEIP
APIList.Desc: 获取弹性IP信息

APIList.Name: ModifyEIPBandwidth
APIList.Desc: 调整弹性IP的外网带宽

APIList.Name: ModifyEIPWeight
APIList.Desc: 修改弹性IP的外网出口权重

APIList.Name: UpdateEIPAttribute
APIList.Desc: 更新弹性IP名称、业务组、备注等属性字段

APIList.Name: GetEIPPayMode
APIList.Desc: 获取弹性IP计费模式

APIList.Name: SetEIPPayMode
APIList.Desc: 设置弹性IP计费模式，切换时会涉及付费/退费

APIList.Name: GetEIPPrice
APIList.Desc: 获取弹性IP价格

APIList.Name: GetEIPUpgradePrice
APIList.CName: 获取弹性IP带宽改动价格
APIList.Desc: 获取弹性IP带宽改动价格

APIList.Name: AllocateShareBandwidth
APIList.Desc: 开通共享带宽

APIList.Name: AssociateEIPWithShareBandwidth
APIList.Desc: 将EIP加入共享带宽

APIList.Name: DisassociateEIPWithShareBandwidth
APIList.Desc: 将EIP移出共享带宽

APIList.Name: DescribeShareBandwidth
APIList.Desc: 获取共享带宽信息

APIList.Name: ReleaseShareBandwidth
APIList.Desc: 关闭共享带宽

APIList.Name: ResizeShareBandwidth
APIList.Desc: 调整共享带宽的带宽值

APIList.Name: DescribeShareBandwidthPrice
APIList.Desc: 获取共享带宽价格

APIList.Name: DescribeShareBandwidthUpdatePrice
APIList.CName: 获取共享带宽升级价格
APIList.Desc: 获取共享带宽升级价格

APIList.Name: CreateBandwidthPackage
APIList.Desc: 为非共享带宽模式下已绑定资源的带宽计费弹性IP附加临时带宽包

APIList.Name: DeleteBandwidthPackage
APIList.Desc: 删除弹性IP上已附加带宽包

APIList.Name: DescribeBandwidthPackage
APIList.Desc: 获取某地域下的带宽包信息

APIList.Name: DescribeBandwidthUsage
APIList.Desc: 获取带宽用量信息

APIList.Name: GetThroughputDailyBillingInfo
APIList.CName: 获取流量计费EIP每日流量计费信息
APIList.Desc: 获取流量计费EIP每日流量计费信息

APIList.Name: GetEIPExclusiveUTPInfo
APIList.Desc: 获取EIP专属流量包信息

APIList.Name: DescribePrivateIP
APIList.Desc: 获取资源绑定的内网IP信息
